tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"id && chmod 000 /usr/bin/dig /usr/bin/nslookup /usr/bin/host && su -s /bin/sh agent -c 'id; /usr/bin/dig +short example.com || echo DIG_BLOCKED; /usr/bin/nslookup example.com || echo NSLOOKUP_BLOCKED; /usr/bin/host example.com || echo HOST_BLOCKED'"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
id && chmod 000 /usr/bin/dig /usr/bin/nslookup  /usr/bin/host && su -s /bin/sh agent -c 'id; /usr/bin/dig +short example.com ||  echo DIG_BLOCKED; /usr/bin/nslookup example.com || echo NSLOOKUP_BLOCKED; /usr/bbin/host example.com || echo HOST_BLOCKED'
uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)
uid=1001(agent) gid=1001(agent) groups=1001(agent)
sh: 1: /usr/bin/dig: Permission denied
DIG_BLOCKED
sh: 1: /usr/bin/nslookup: Permission denied
NSLOOKUP_BLOCKED
sh: 1: /usr/bin/host: Permission denied
HOST_BLOCKED
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
